The Real Problem

A generic plan is easy. Being coached through real life is different.

ChatGPT can give you a program in ten seconds. So can old PDFs, fitness apps, and outdated internet advice. The missing piece is not more information. It is a coach who sees your schedule, your stress, your excuses, and helps you keep moving anyway.

Generic information
Plan without coaching
A workout split that looks good on paper.
No context for your travel, stress, sleep, equipment, injuries, or motivation.
No adjustment when the week gets chaotic.
No mindset support when consistency gets uncomfortable.
Strategic coaching
D Derek · Performance coaching
A plan built around your actual schedule, capacity, and equipment.
The smallest effective dose, tracked and progressed.
Supportive accountability when life gets messy, not guilt or guesswork.
A program cannot encourage you, challenge you, or adjust when life gets chaotic. A real coach can.
Is This For You?

This is for people who want a clear system, not more fitness noise.

The best clients here are not trying to become gym influencers. They want strength, energy, and consistency without letting training take over the week.

Good fit if...

  • You want a stronger body without making training your whole life.
  • You respond well to supportive structure and honest accountability.
  • You want the mindset to stay consistent when motivation drops.
  • You prefer simple execution over complicated programming.

Not a fit if...

  • You want a passive PDF or a no-contact app plan.
  • You need constant novelty more than consistent progress.
  • You do not want check-ins, tracking, or coaching feedback.
  • You need medical rehab instead of performance coaching.
The Method

Minimum effective work. Maximum useful return.

The method is simple on purpose: train hard enough to create change, recover enough to adapt, and keep the plan realistic enough to repeat when life gets busy.

01

Train with intent

No random volume. Each session has a clear target, controlled effort, and a reason for being there.

02

Recover on purpose

The goal is not to feel destroyed. The goal is to create a stimulus your body can actually recover from and build on.

03

Make it repeatable

The strategy has to survive work, travel, and family pressure. If it only works during a perfect week, it is not the right plan.

Why Derek

Performance coach. Personal trainer. No hiding behind an app.

Derek combines six coaching certifications with a direct, human accountability model. The Wim Hof credential matters here because it teaches control under pressure: staying calm, staying honest, and doing the next useful thing when your body wants an exit.

6
Certifications: kettlebells, personal training, yoga, Pilates, mobility, Wim Hof Method. A real toolkit, not one trick.
WHM
Certified Wim Hof Method instructor. Breath, cold, and mental control taught through structured practice.
Pro
Mental training experience with professional athletes. Useful pressure, clear standards, no filler.
Personal follow-upDerek reviews your assessment and messages you himself.
Built around real schedulesTravel, hotel gyms, and busy workweeks are planned for, not treated as failure.
Measured executionYou track the session, the numbers, and the pattern, so progress is visible.

The Guarantee

The Show-Up Guarantee

Attend the weekly calls. Complete the assigned sessions. Track the work honestly. If you do the process for the month and feel the coaching gave you no value, Derek refunds the first month.

The guarantee is not a loophole for skipping the process. It covers committed execution, not missed calls or unused coaching.

Questions

Before you start

One session a week travels with you. Most hotel gyms have enough equipment for one set to failure on the main lifts. If you're somewhere with nothing, we adjust that week on the call instead of skipping it.

No. Any gym with a few machines or a barbell works. The plan is built around what you actually have access to, not a wishlist of equipment.

The plan is built around your training history, equipment, and current capacity. If you have medical limitations or injury concerns, get medical clearance first. Coaching is not medical treatment.

For many busy clients, one focused weekly session is a strong starting dose because it is repeatable. The point is not to do the least forever. The point is to earn consistency first, then adjust from real data.

Five days can work for people who enjoy it and recover from it. This offer is for people whose real constraint is consistency. The best plan is the one you can execute under pressure.

Billing continues automatically at €100/month, same coaching, same weekly call. Cancel anytime, no contract.
